deterministic.reason: em dash is the house norm in portless; the em-dash half of the style gate does not apply

note: Blind harvest-loop validation: F1 was encoded as a general lens before this run; a different-family reviewer relocated it in the diff. Not a proof the gate catches unseen bugs. Bug still present on branch (no fix commit as of 2026-07-22).
